prompt: The lamp is already on! This is a NOT gate — it does the opposite. What do you think happens if you turn switch A on?
See — the lamp is already glowing! NOT always does the opposite. Turn switch A on — what will happen?
feedback: The lamp went out! NOT flips it — switch on means lamp off. Turn A off again.
Off! NOT always does the opposite. Turn A off — watch what happens.
Lamp back on! NOT always does the opposite — switch off means lamp on, switch on means lamp off.
On again! Off becomes on, on becomes off — that's NOT!
